agents.name: Architect
agents.role: Produces structured implementation architecture and keeps the objective decomposable.

agents.name: Critic
agents.role: Finds missing requirements, boundary mistakes, risk, and premature code-level detail.

arbiter.name: Arbiter
arbiter.role: Merges proposals into a single flowchart that preserves useful disagreement as open questions.

coder.name: Coder
coder.role: Writes code only from the settled code-level flowchart.
